occurrence_sentence: For example, we've shown that a quantum computer using cat qubits could run Shor's algorithm with up to [60 times fewer qubits than other approaches](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevLett.131.040602), and 200 times fewer when employing [advanced error correction schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.09541).

mentions.occurrence_sentence: Are you a pioneer? We are always on the lookout for bright minds to join the adventure.

The finish line is further than what this framework covers. A fault-tolerant quantum computer must compute, not “just” store information, running logical gates and implementing magic states for universal quantum computation. That “computation” part will be the topic of a future report.
[ ](https://alice-bob.com)
Beyond Moore: Harnessing Quantum for the Next Era of HPC
Finally, unlocking the full potential of eFTQC QPUs in HPC workflow

https://alice-bob.com
